name: Advisor
description: Wise and well-informed, you provide advice and guidance so your employer prospers.

name: Agitator
description: Charismatic and articulate, you champion your cause in the face of establishment opposition.

name: Apothecary
description:
Skilled in chemistry and concoctions, you create and sell medicine of
all kinds.

name: Artisan
description: A skilled craftsperson, you take pride in your work, creating products for sale and commission.

name: Artist
description: You possess an artistic gift, one that transcends daily life and uplifts the souls of others.

levels.title: Apprentice Artist
trappings: Brush or Chisel or Quill Pen

name: Bailiff
description: You are an official trusted by local rulers to administer their lands efficiently and firmly.

name: Bawd
description: Street-wise and mercenary, you make a living selling illicit goods in the seedier side of town.

name: Beggar
description: Street-smart, you make a living from the charity of others using persuasion and charm.

name: Boatman
description: You ply the dangerous waters of the Old World, transporting people, goods, and the latest news.

name: Cavalryman
description:
A dashing and fearless rider, you bring speed, versatility, and skill-at-arms
to the battlefield.

levels.title: Horseman
trappings: Riding Horse with Saddle and Tack

levels.title: Cavalryman
trappings: Light Warhorse with Saddle and Tack

name: Charlatan
description: Unscrupulous and charming, you separate fools from their money; thankfully, there is no shortage of fools…

levels.title: Charlatan
trappings: Selection of Coloured Powders and Water

name: Coachman
description: Determined and rugged, you deliver passengers safely by coach despite the daily dangers you face.

name: Duellist
description:
Your blade is an instrument of justice, bound by long tradition and
employed with deadly precision.

levels.title: Fencer
trappings: Sling Bag containing Clothing and 1d10 Bandages

name: Engineer
description: You excel at building machines and constructions that might are useful, inspiring and quite often also deadly.

name: Entertainer
description: Whether high-born or low-brow, you distract people from the harsh realities of life.

levels.title: Entertainer
trappings: Selection of Scripts (that you can’t yet read)

name: Envoy
description: An articulate emissary, you travel far and wide, negotiating favorable pacts and treaties.

name: Fence
description: A shrewd assessor of valuables, you’ll buy anything, legal or not, and turn it around for a tidy profit.

name: Flagellant
description: Just when you abandoned all hope, your suffering and the righteousness of Sigmar saved you!

name: Grave Robber
description: You brave the threat of necromancy, stealing from the dead to line your own pockets.

name: Guard
description: Your job is simple: keep undesirables out.

name: Hedge Witch
description: Wise and secretive, you guide your community using ancient magic handed down for generations.

name: Herbalist
description: Skilled botanists who use Rhya’s bounty to create cures for many ailments.

levels.title: Herb Gatherer
trappings: Sling Bag containing Assortment of Herbs

name: Huffer
description: You pilot ships and boats through the most treacherous waters of the Old World. High Elves can be Huffers in Ulthuan.

name: Hunter
description: Tough, independent killers who make a living off the fur and flesh of wild creatures.

levels.title: Huntsmaster
trappings: Riding Horse with Saddle and Tack

name: Investigator
description: Perceptive and suspicious, you probe deep into the heart of any crime, and find answers.

name: Knight
description: Thundering into battle on a heavy charger, you dominate the field, spreading fear in your wake.

levels.title: Squire
trappings: Riding Horse with Saddle and Tack

levels.title: Knight of the Inner Circle
trappings: Large Unit of Knights or Several Small Units of Knights

name: Lawyer
description:
You navigate treacherous legal systems, defending clients and
prosecuting the guilty.

name: Merchant
description:
Shrewd and numerate, you buy low to sell high, making more money
than most will ever see.

name: Merchant
description:
Shrewd and numerate, you buy low to sell high, making more money
than most will ever see.

name: Messenger
description: Swift and sure-footed, nothing stops you delivering your messages on time.

levels.title: Messenger
trappings: Riding Horse with Saddle and Tack

name: Miner
description: A hewer of stone, you pursue back-breaking work in the darkest depths of the world.

name: Mystic
description: You have a talent for divining the future, or for convincing others you can…

name: Noble
description: As the scion of a noble bloodline, you stand proudly from the common rabble.

levels.title: Noble
trappings: Riding Horse with Saddle and Harness or Coach

levels.title: Noble Lord
trappings: 4 sets of Best Quality Courtly Garb

name: Nun
description: You dedicate your life to the service of your god, having sworn vows that bind you in a life of service.

name: Outlaw
description: You prey upon travelers, extracting a toll from the vulnerable and the unsuspecting.

levels.title: Outlaw Chief
trappings: Riding Horse with Saddle and Tack

name: Pedlar
description: Worldly-wise and free of interference, you wander the Empire selling your wares where you will.

name: Physician
description: Your steady hand has saved countless lives, while your strong stomach has helped you endure many gruesome sights.

name: Pit Fighter
description: You fight for money, for glory, and for the entertainment of the masses.

name: Priest
description: You carry the word of your god, tending to the spiritual needs of the masses.

name: Protagonist
description: A strong-arm for hire, you bully, fight, and maybe even kill for coin.

levels.title: Protagonist
trappings: Riding Horse with Saddle and Tack

name: Racketeer
description: You are part of an organised criminal gang, collecting debts and extorting money from the weak.

name: Rat Catcher
description: You spare civilisation from being overrun by vermin with help from your trusty, canine companion.

levels.title: Exterminator
trappings: Sack of Poisoned Bait (10 doses of Heartkill)

name: Riverwarden
description:
Strong-backed and sure, you patrol the riverways in pursuit of
lawbreakers and troublemakers.

name: Riverwoman
description: Rivers carry most of the Old World’s traffic, and you stand in the heart of that excitement.

name: Road Warden
description: With a wary eye and ready weapon, you tour the highways of the Empire enforcing the law.

levels.title: Road Warden
trappings: Riding Horse with Saddle and Harness

name: Scholar
description: You dedicate your life to the pursuit and study of knowledge, wherever that may take you.

name: Scout
description: Intrepid and resourceful, you guide others through the dangerous wilds of the Old World.

levels.title: Pathfinder
trappings: Riding Horse with Saddle and Tack

name: Seaman
description: A life on the ocean waves calls to you, though many Reiklander Seamen never see the sea…

name: Servant
description: You serve the great and the good, performing tasks in support of your employer. High Elves assume servant roles only on Ulthuan, never in the Old World.

name: Slayer
description: You are rage and shame incarnate, seeking a worthy death to reclaim your lost honour.

name: Smuggler
description:
You smuggle cargo, avoiding taxes and risking riverwarden
inspections to secure maximum profit.

name: Soldier
description: You are paid to train, be disciplined, and, when the need comes, go to war.

levels.title: Officer
trappings: Light Warhorse with Saddle and Tack

name: Spy
description: You are the eyes and ears of another, exposing secrets and spreading lies.

levels.title: Informer
trappings: Sling Bag containing 2 different sets of clothing and Hooded Cloak

name: Stevedore
description: You may officially load cargo for coin, but everyone knows the Stevedores rule the docklands. High Elves become stevedores only on Ulthuan, never in the Old World.

name: Thief
description:
You steal from others in order to line your own pockets, and you’re
rather good at it.

name: Townsman
description: Ambitious and socially mobile, you are the hardworking glue that holds urban society together.

levels.title: Burgomeister
trappings: Large Townhouse with Gardens and Servants

name: Villager
description: You are the beating heart of rural life, working the countryside to feed civilization. Villager High Elves can be found in Ulthuan only.

name: Warden
description: You oversee another’s territory, ensuring it is properly maintained and, if necessary, protected.

levels.title: Warden
trappings: Hand Weapon or Bow with 10 arrows
Riding Horse with Saddle and Harness

name: Warrior Priest
description: You bring divinity to the thick of battle, slaying the enemies of the Empire with righteous fury.

levels.title: Priest Sergeant
trappings: Light Warhorse with Saddle and Tack

name: Watchman
description: You maintain the peace and keep the rabble in line so your town doesn’t descend into anarchy.

levels.title: Watch Captain
trappings: Riding Horse with Saddle and Tack

name: Witch
description: Wilful and ambitious, you strive to master magic without an officially sanctioned licence to operate.

name: Witch Hunter
description:
You hunt the illegal witches plaguing the Empire by any and all
means necessary.

levels.title: Witch Hunter
trappings: Riding Horse with Saddle and Tack

name: Wizard
description: Feared and distrusted by the citizens of the Empire, you legally wield powerful and dangerous magic.

name: Wrecker
description: You lure vessels to a watery doom and make off with their cargo.

levels.title: Wrecker Captain
trappings: Fleet of Riverboats and Wrecker Crew
